adds: partial_exit primitive via strategy.check_partial_exit(ctx) — fraction in [0.01, 0.99]
stop_mutation primitive via strategy.check_stop_mutation(ctx) — monotone guard
ctx.unrealized_r (close-based, initial-stop denominator) exposed in per-bar context
trade dict gains partial_leg, partial_of_parent, stop_mutation_rejected when applicable
invariants: Canonical per-bar order (in-position): SL/TP -> partial -> stop_mutation -> check_exit
Partial guard: partial_taken == False AND bars_held >= 1 AND unrealized_r >= 1.0001
Stop mutation is monotone: long tightens up only, short tightens down only; silent reject otherwise
Entry market state initial_stop_price is FROZEN; stop_price_active is live-mutable
No-hook strategies produce byte-equivalent trade dicts to v1.5.6
